name: Ubiquiti 10G PoE++ Adapter (60W)
title: Ubiquiti 10G PoE++ Adapter (60W)
short_description: Ubiquiti 10G PoE++ Adapter (60W) from 42.11 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option.
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-PoE++-10G is a versatile Power over Ethernet (PoE+) adapter designed to deliver up to 60 watts of power to compatible UniFi devices while supporting data transmission speeds up to 10 Gbps. This adapter is ideal for scenarios where deploying a full PoE switch is impractical or cost-prohibitive, offering a reliable alternative for powering devices such as access points and cameras. Its compact dimensions and lightweight design make it suitable for various installation environments. The adapter operates within a wide input voltage range of 100–240V AC at 50/60Hz and provides a stable 54V DC output at 1.12A. With an efficiency rating exceeding 88% and a switching frequency of up to 65 kHz, the UACC-PoE++-10G minimizes energy loss and heat generation. Its RJ45 shielded socket supports 4-pair powering on pins 1,2,4,5 (+) and 3,6,7,8 (-), aligning with standard PoE+ specifications. This adapter is a practical solution for extending PoE capabilities in existing network infrastructures without significant overhauls. The UACC-PoE++-10G is engineered with robust safety features to protect both the adapter and connected devices. It includes surge protection mechanisms capable of handling up to 1500A for power lines and 36A for data lines, with clamping protection set at 11V for data and 60V for power. These features safeguard against voltage spikes and electrical surges, which are common in dynamic network environments. The adapter's response time is less than 1 nanosecond, ensuring rapid reaction to electrical anomalies. It operates effectively within an ambient temperature range of 0 to 40°C, with humidity tolerance between 10% and 95% non-condensing. Certified by CE, FCC, IC, UL, UKCA, KC, CCC, and RoHS, the UACC-PoE++-10G meets international standards for safety and environmental compliance. Its design includes an LED indicator for status monitoring, providing visual confirmation of operational states, which aids in troubleshooting and maintenance. Overall, the UACC-PoE++-10G combines high-speed data support, efficient power delivery, and comprehensive protection features, making it a reliable choice for enhancing network setups.
